name: dfmt_remember
description: Record an LLM interaction with token usage for session tracking

cached_tokens.description: Number of cached tokens (prompt cache savings)

input_tokens.description: Number of input tokens sent to LLM

message.description: Description or summary of the interaction

output_tokens.description: Number of output tokens received from LLM

type.description: Event type (use 'llm.response' for LLM calls, 'note' for notes)
